Project details

Discover the key features and highlights of this project — everything you need to know at a glance.

Pacific Grove, CA

Willow Creek Estate

Area

1,800 sq.ft

Starting Price

$550,000

Project Status

Completed

Configuration

3 BHK

Project description:

Welcome to Willow Creek Estate, a beautifully crafted residential enclave nestled in the heart of Pacific Grove, CA. This completed project features spacious 3 BHK homes with a generous 1,800 sq ft layout, thoughtfully designed to offer comfort, style, and modern living.

Each home blends classic architecture with contemporary finishes, making it perfect for growing families or those seeking peaceful suburban living with access to city conveniences. Enjoy landscaped gardens, ample parking, and nearby schools, shopping, and parks — all within a quiet, well-connected neighborhood.

Gallery:

Location:
Address:

123, Pacific Grove, CA

Transportation:
  • Hospital: Pacific General Hospital – 2.5 km
  • Airport: Monterey Regional Airport – 18 km
  • Train Station: Central Station – 3.1 km
  • Bank: California First Bank – 1.2 km
  • Highway: Highway NH60 – 1.8 km
